message:
fix(store,persist): upgrade DUMP/RESTORE from CRC16 to CRC64

- Expose crc64_redis as pub in fr-persist
- Add fr-persist dependency to fr-store
- dump_key: write 8-byte CRC64 trailer instead of 2-byte CRC16
- restore_key: validate 8-byte CRC64, minimum payload size 18 bytes
- All bounds checks now consistently exclude the 17-byte trailer
  (8 TTL + 1 version + 8 CRC64), preventing parser from reading
  into trailer bytes for non-String types

Closes: frankenredis-07w

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
